name: showsuite
description: Theatre Management CRM - Production Management System

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run compile && npm run copy-assets
scripts.compile: babel script.js --out-file dist/script.js && babel src --out-dir dist/src --copy-files --ignore 'src/components/_disabled/**'
scripts.copy-assets: cp index.production.html dist/index.html && cp style.css dist/ && [ -f papaparse_min.js ] && cp papaparse_min.js dist/ || echo 'papaparse not found'
